description: Tous (طوس) was the direct successor to [Jame'eh](/orgs/jameeh-newspaper), relaunched by [Mashallah Shamsolvaezin](/people/mashallah-shamsolvaezin) and [Hamid Reza Jalalipour](/people/hamid-reza-jalalipour) with the same staff under a new masthead and dormant license. Tous was also closed within months, and Shamsolvaezin immediately relaunched as [Neshat](/orgs/neshat-newspaper). The pattern — acquire a dormant license and restart with the same team — became the defining structural feature of Khatami-era reformist journalism.
